title: Problem-Driven Design Patterns · Behavior Case: Oop Factory Pattern
summary: Add pricing, notifications, imports, commands, and persistence without turning patterns into ceremony. Planned artifact: Add and verify the oop factory pattern increment in an extensible library operations toolkit. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use factory functions or objects when construction choice, configuration, validation, or lifecycle must be centralized.
Use strategy objects or callables when an algorithm varies independently and must be selected or tested explicitly.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
